outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/adadas.R
+++ b/adadas.R
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # Bug 1: CHG is inverted (should be AVAL - BASE, not BASE - AVAL)
 adadas <- adadas %>%
-  mutate(CHG = BASE - AVAL) %>%
+  mutate(CHG = AVAL - BASE) %>%
   group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD) %>%
   mutate(ANL01FL = ifelse(ADY == max(ADY[!is.na(AVAL)]), "Y", "")) %>%
   ungroup() %>%
@@ -8,5 +8,5 @@
 # Bug 2: ANL01FL should only be set for post-baseline records
 adadas <- adadas %>%
-  mutate(ANL01FL = ifelse(ADY >= 0 & ADY == max(ADY[!is.na(AVAL)]), "Y", "")) %>%
+  mutate(ANL01FL = ifelse(ABLFL != "Y" & ADY == max(ADY[!is.na(AVAL)]), "Y", "")) %>%
   group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD) %>%
   mutate(ANL01FL = ifelse(any(ANL01FL == "Y"), ANL01FL, "")) %>%
@@ -14,5 +14,5 @@
 # Bug 3: PCHG divides by BASE, not AVAL
 adadas <- adadas %>%
-  mutate(PCHG = (AVAL - BASE) / AVAL * 100) %>%
+  mutate(PCHG = (AVAL - BASE) / BASE * 100) %>%
   mutate(PCHG = ifelse(BASE == 0, NA, PCHG))
